FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.27sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7fe8caa17270>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'test_username': 'testuser', 'user_list': [{'active_time': '2026-06-01T21:39:39Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-06-01T21:38:07Z', 'email': '', ...}]}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:915: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

user_list = [{'active_time': '2026-06-01T21:39:39Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-06-01T21:38:07Z', 'email': '', ...}]
test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )
E       AssertionError: Test user 'testuser' (from 'testuser') not found in user list: ['__bootstrap_admin__']
E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

2026/06/01 21:41:03.552085738 {

2026/06/01 21:41:03.552249364 new$paper <- paper
2026/06/01 21:41:03.552250304 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/06/01 21:41:03.552260965 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/06/01 21:41:03.552261434 if (!missing(bg))

2026/06/01 21:41:03.552280924 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/06/01 21:41:03.552281560 if (!missing(pagecentre))

2026/06/01 21:41:03.552364962 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {

2026/06/01 21:41:03.552381124 "default"))
2026/06/01 21:41:03.552388454 old$encoding <- enc

2026/06/01 21:41:03.552416091 }

2026/06/01 21:41:03.552422035 }
2026/06/01 21:41:03.552422495 else if (length(family) == 1L) {

2026/06/01 21:41:01.406285211 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406294913 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406353095 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,

2026/06/01 21:41:01.406373943 {
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406374904 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406384968 new <- list()
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406385922 if (!missing(width))
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406396962 new$width <- width
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406397668 if (!missing(height))
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406409275 new$height <- height
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406410130 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406421770 new$onefile <- onefile

2026/06/01 21:41:01.406446460 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406447193 if (!missing(version))
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406458207 new$version <- version
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406458937 if (!missing(paper))
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406470727 new$paper <- paper
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406471539 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406483211 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406484067 if (!missing(bg))
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406495473 new$bg <- bg
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406496340 if (!missing(fg))
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406506641 new$fg <- fg
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406507355 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406518230 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406519036 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406531668 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406533975 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406546591 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406547330 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406558548 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406559308 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406582350 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406583079 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406594999 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406595673 if (!missing(compress))
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406608326 new$compress <- compress
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406609131 if (!missing(timestamp))
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406621338 new$timestamp <- timestamp
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406622190 if (!missing(producer))
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406634544 new$producer <- producer
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406635358 if (!missing(author))
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406646800 new$author <- author
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406648618 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406668462 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406669402 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {

2026/06/01 21:41:01.406685249 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406700007 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406700910 "default"))
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406734270 old$encoding <- enc
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406735108 family <- family$metrics
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406747601 }
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406748219 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406760549 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406761429 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406774246 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406774947 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406785568 }
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406838852 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406839948 }
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406850792 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406851648 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406864654 if (is.null(pf))
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406865396 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406892476 domain = NA)
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406899880 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406901911 }
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406918918 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406919764 old$family <- family
2026/06/01 21:41:01.406932177 }

2026/06/01 21:41:01.406969294 "2.0")

2026/06/01 21:41:01.406999851 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/06/01 21:41:01.407000611 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/06/01 21:41:01.407010637 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/06/01 21:41:01.407011282 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/06/01 21:41:01.407036394 domain = NA)
2026/06/01 21:41:01.407045485 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/06/01 21:41:01.407046346 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/06/01 21:41:01.407060258 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
